syntax_2398.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2398.title: Is ID Playing
syntax_2398.description: Check if a song with an ID is playing.

en: Check if a song with an ID is playing.

syntax_2399.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2399.title: Player Can Hear
syntax_2399.description: Check if a song is playing for a user.

en: Check if a song is playing for a user.

syntax_2400.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2400.title: Player in Range
syntax_2400.description: Check if a minecraft player is in range of the position song player.
syntax_2400.syntax_pattern:
%player% (1¦is|2¦is(n't| not)) in range [of [the]] position song[ ]player %positionsongplayer%
%player% (1¦can|2¦can(n't| not)) hear [the] position song[ ]player %positionsongplayer%

en: Check if a minecraft player is in range of the position song player.

syntax_2401.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2401.title: Song Player Playing
syntax_2401.description: Check if a song is playing for a user.

en: Check if a song is playing for a user.

syntax_2402.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2402.title: Position Song Player Tick
syntax_2402.description: Play a tick of a song to the user(s).

en: Play a tick of a song to the user(s).

syntax_2403.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2403.title: Player Stop Playing
syntax_2403.description: Stops a song from being played to the minecraft player(s). Doesn't seem to work well, use the player list of a song player.

en: Stops a song from being played to the minecraft player(s). Doesn't seem to work well, use the player list of a song player.

syntax_2404.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2404.title: Pause Song
syntax_2404.description: Pause a song with an ID.

en: Pause a song with an ID.

syntax_2405.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2405.title: Play Song
syntax_2405.description: Play a song with an ID.

en: Play a song with an ID.
Destory/Remove the song player(s).

syntax_2407.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2407.title: Start Song
syntax_2407.description: Plays a new song for a user with an optional ID system to be able to easily manage the song being played.

en: Plays a new song for a user with an optional ID system to be able to easily manage the song being played.

syntax_2408.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2408.title: ID Songs
syntax_2408.description: Returns the ID's of all songs currently playing.

en: Returns the ID's of all songs currently playing.

syntax_2409.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2409.title: Position Song Player
syntax_2409.description: Returns new position song player(s) from the given song(s). A position song player is a song player that is locked on a location.

en: Returns new position song player(s) from the given song(s). A position song player is a song player that is locked on a location.

syntax_2410.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2410.title: Players in ID
syntax_2410.description: Returns the players currently listening to a song with an ID. Returns as a string because that's what NoteBlockAPI does.
syntax_2410.syntax_pattern: [(all [[of] the]|the)] player[s] (in|listening to) song with id[s] %strings%

en: Returns the players currently listening to a song with an ID. Returns as a string because that's what NoteBlockAPI does.

syntax_2411.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2411.title: inventory Slots
syntax_2411.description: A temporary setup for multiple slots while Bensku updates Skript with my pull request to add this.

en: A temporary setup for multiple slots while Bensku updates Skript with my pull request to add this.

syntax_2412.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2412.title: Song Player
syntax_2412.description: Returns new song player(s) from the given song(s).

en: Returns new song player(s) from the given song(s).

syntax_2413.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2413.title: Note Block Song Player
syntax_2413.description: Returns new noteblock song player(s) from the given song(s). A noteblock song player is a song player that is locked on a block which is a noteblock.

en: Returns new noteblock song player(s) from the given song(s). A noteblock song player is a song player that is locked on a block which is a noteblock.

syntax_2414.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2414.title: Song
syntax_2414.description: Returns songs based from the file strings. Can accept a file path string or a url link.

en: Returns songs based from the file strings. Can accept a file path string or a url link.

syntax_2415.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2415.title: Song Players of ID
syntax_2415.description: Returns the song's music player(s) of string(s).

en: Returns the song's music player(s) of string(s).

syntax_2416.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2416.title: Layer Note
syntax_2416.description: Returns a note at the defined tick of the song.

en: Returns a note at the defined tick of the song.

syntax_2417.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2417.title: Songs in File
syntax_2417.description: Returns all the .nbs songs in a file location.

en: Returns all the .nbs songs in a file location.

syntax_2418.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2418.title: Position Song Player Distance
syntax_2418.description: Returns the distance that the position song player(s) can be heard from. The default distance is 16.
syntax_2418.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] [sound] (distance|range)[s] of position song[ ]player[s] %positionsongplayers%
%positionsongplayers%['s] position song[ ]player[s] [sound] (distance|range)[s]

en: Returns the distance that the position song player(s) can be heard from. The default distance is 16.

syntax_2419.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2419.title: Player Volume
syntax_2419.description: Returns the volume of the user(s). This is like a preference system for each minecraft user.
syntax_2419.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] sound volume[s] of [player[s]] %players%
%players%['s] [player[s]] sound volume[s]

en: Returns the volume of the user(s). This is like a preference system for each minecraft user.

syntax_2420.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2420.title: Song Description
syntax_2420.description: Returns the description of the song(s).
syntax_2420.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] desc[ription[s]] of song[s] %songs%
%songs%['s] song[s] desc[ription[s]]

en: Returns the description of the song(s).

syntax_2421.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2421.title: Song Height
syntax_2421.description: Returns the height of the song(s).
syntax_2421.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] height[s] of song[s] %songs%
%songs%['s] song[s] height[s]

en: Returns the height of the song(s).

syntax_2422.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2422.title: Song Player Volume
syntax_2422.description: Returns the volume of the song player(s).
syntax_2422.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] volume[s] of song[ ]player[s] %songplayers%
%songplayers%['s] song[ ]player[s] volume[s]

en: Returns the volume of the song player(s).

syntax_2423.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2423.title: Song Player Tick
syntax_2423.description: Returns the tick that the song player(s) are currently on.
syntax_2423.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] [playing] tick[s] of song[ ]player[s] %songplayers%
%songplayers%['s] song[ ]player[s] [playing] tick[s]

en: Returns the tick that the song player(s) are currently on.

syntax_2424.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2424.title: Song Player Song
syntax_2424.description: Returns the song currently playing in the song player(s).

en: Returns the song currently playing in the song player(s).

syntax_2425.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2425.title: Song Player Fade Target
syntax_2425.description: Returns the fade target of the song player(s).

en: Returns the fade target of the song player(s).

syntax_2426.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2426.title: Song Delay
syntax_2426.description: Returns the delay of the song(s) if they have a delay.
syntax_2426.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] delay[s] of song[s] %songs%
%songs%['s] song[s] delay[s]

en: Returns the delay of the song(s) if they have a delay.

syntax_2427.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2427.title: Song Player Fade Duration
syntax_2427.description: Returns the fade duration time of the song player(s).

en: Returns the fade duration time of the song player(s).

syntax_2428.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2428.title: Note Block Song Player Distance
syntax_2428.description: Returns the distance that the noteblock song player(s) can be heard from. The default distance is 16.
syntax_2428.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] [sound] (distance|range)[s] of note[ ]block song[ ]player[s] %noteblocksongplayers%
%noteblocksongplayers%['s] note[ ]block song[ ]player[s] [sound] (distance|range)[s]

en: Returns the distance that the noteblock song player(s) can be heard from. The default distance is 16.

syntax_2429.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2429.title: Song Speed
syntax_2429.description: Returns the speed/tempo of the song(s).

en: Returns the speed/tempo of the song(s).

syntax_2430.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2430.title: Song Player Fade
syntax_2430.description: Returns the fade type of the song player(s). The fade type is how the song fades. Currently there is only linear

en: Returns the fade type of the song player(s). The fade type is how the song fades. Currently there is only linear

syntax_2431.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2431.title: Song Player Category
syntax_2431.description: Returns the song currently playing in the song player(s).

en: Returns the song currently playing in the song player(s).

syntax_2432.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2432.title: Song Title
syntax_2432.description: Returns the title of the song(s).

en: Returns the title of the song(s).

syntax_2433.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2433.title: Song Author
syntax_2433.description: Returns the author of the song(s).

en: Returns the author of the song(s).

syntax_2434.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2434.title: Song Player Fade Finish
syntax_2434.description: Returns the fade finishing time of the song player(s).

en: Returns the fade finishing time of the song player(s).

syntax_2435.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2435.title: Position Song Player Target
syntax_2435.description: Returns the location of the position song player(s).
syntax_2435.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] (target [location]|location)[s] of position song[ ]player[s] %positionsongplayers%
%positionsongplayers%['s] position song[ ]player[s] (target [location]|location)[s]

en: Returns the location of the position song player(s).

syntax_2436.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2436.title: Note Block Song Player Block
syntax_2436.description: Returns the actual noteblock block of the noteblock song player(s).
syntax_2436.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] [note[ ]]block[s] of position song[ ]player[s] %noteblocksongplayers%
%noteblocksongplayers%['s] position song[ ]player[s] [note[ ]]block[s]

en: Returns the actual noteblock block of the noteblock song player(s).

syntax_2437.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2437.title: Song Length
syntax_2437.description: Returns the length of the song(s).
syntax_2437.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] length[s] of song[s] %songs%
%songs%['s] song[s] length[s]

en: Returns the length of the song(s).

syntax_2438.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2438.title: Song Player Listeners
syntax_2438.description: Returns the listeners of the song player(s).

en: Returns the listeners of the song player(s).

syntax_2439.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2439.title: Song Player Playing
syntax_2439.description: Returns if the song player(s) are playing or not.
syntax_2439.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] [music] playing [state[s]] of song[ ]player[s] %songplayers%
%songplayers%['s] song[ ]player[s] [music] playing [state[s]]

en: Returns if the song player(s) are playing or not.

syntax_2440.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2440.title: Song Player Auto Destory
syntax_2440.description: Returns if the song player(s) should destroy on finish.
syntax_2440.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] [auto] destroy[s] of song[ ]player[s] %songplayers%
%songplayers%['s] song[ ]player[s] [auto] destroy[s]

en: Returns if the song player(s) should destroy on finish.

syntax_2441.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2441.title: Song Player Fade Start
syntax_2441.description: Returns the fade starting time of the song player(s).

en: Returns the fade starting time of the song player(s).

syntax_2442.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2442.title: Song Layer
syntax_2442.description: Returns the layers of the song(s). The layers are like a chart of all the notes.

en: Returns the layers of the song(s). The layers are like a chart of all the notes.

syntax_2443.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2443.title: Layer Name
syntax_2443.description: Returns the name of the layer(s).
syntax_2443.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] name[s] of layer[s] %layers%
%layers%['s] layer[s] name[s]

en: Returns the name of the layer(s).

syntax_2444.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2444.title: Layer Volume
syntax_2444.description: Returns the volume of the layer(s).
syntax_2444.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] volume[s] of layer[s] %layers%
%layers%['s] layer[s] volume[s]

en: Returns the volume of the layer(s).

syntax_2445.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2445.title: Note Pitch
syntax_2445.description: Returns the pitch(s) of the Note(s). The return number is from a byte.
syntax_2445.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] pitch[s] of note[s] %notes%
%notes%['s] note[s] pitch[s]

en: Returns the pitch(s) of the Note(s). The return number is from a byte.

syntax_2446.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2446.title: Note instrument
syntax_2446.description: Returns the instrument(s) of the Note(s). The return number is from a byte.

en: Returns the instrument(s) of the Note(s). The return number is from a byte.

syntax_2447.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2447.title: Note Key
syntax_2447.description: Returns the key(s) of the Note(s). The return number is from a byte. Key is what can be used to get the pitch. Subtract it by 33 or just use the pitch from note syntax.
syntax_2447.syntax_pattern:
[(all [[of] the]|the)] key[s] of note[s] %notes%
%notes%['s] note[s] key[s]

en: Returns the key(s) of the Note(s). The return number is from a byte. Key is what can be used to get the pitch. Subtract it by 33 or just use the pitch from note syntax.
